findings.evidence: `lowerFace` ignores `_hv` at lines 71-74; lower subset/weight proofs use only `Finset.erase_subset` at lines 145-149 and 186-191; the existing unbundled API has no membership assumption for `characteristicLowerFaceExponent` and its facts in `CubeFace.lean:73-94`.
findings.fix: Define `lowerFace C v` without the membership argument, make `vertices_lowerFace_subset`, `characteristicWeight_lowerFace_le`, `characteristicLowerFaceExponent`, its `natCast`, and its zero iff theorem work for arbitrary `v`; keep only dimension-drop lemmas as `_of_mem`.
findings.issue: `lowerFace` and the bundled lower-face lemmas/exponent require `hv : v ∈ C.directions`, but that proof is unused for the lower face and its weight/exponent facts.

summary: The lower-face side of the bundled API is less general than the existing unbundled API: it requires a membership proof even for erase-based facts that do not need one.
